scripts_using: fetch_matches.py; scripts/run_today_match_pipeline.py; scripts/run_historical_labeling_pipeline.py; scripts/refresh_finished_results_by_date.py; scripts/refresh_finished_results.py; scripts/enrich_recent_form.py; scripts/enrich_recent_form_v2.py; scripts/check_api_plan.py
purpose: Base fixture list, today fixtures, historical finished fixtures, post-result refresh, and recent-form source
main_params: date, timezone; team, season, last; league, season, last in diagnostics
evidence: api_football_cache.sqlite3 has 577 /fixtures entries; data/raw/api_matches.json stores date+timezone payload; team_recent_fixtures_cache_v2.json stores team-season last-15 fixture payloads
notes: Production uses core fixture/league/team/goal/status fields; ignores venue/referee/periods/logos/league round/team winner except status/result basics.

purpose: Table position and urgency context for TIER_1/TIER_2 matches
notes: Uses all-table rank/points/goalsDiff/played/goals; ignores home/away split, recent table form string, description/qualification zone, group/status/update.

purpose: Pre-match market prices for 1X2, BTTS, O/U, double chance, draw-no-bet
evidence: api_football_cache.sqlite3 has 814 /odds entries; matches.csv contains odds_*_v3 and implied probability columns
notes: v3 fetches full fixture odds but only extracts six bet families and max odd per outcome; bookmaker identity, bookmaker-specific lines, update time, many market families, market depth, and line movement are ignored.

purpose: Find prior first leg for two-leg ties and derive aggregate state before second leg
evidence: api_football_cache.sqlite3 has 69 /fixtures/headtohead entries; data/raw/tie_context_cache.json stores 69 h2h key payloads
notes: Uses only fixture id/date/timestamp, league id/season, teams ids, goals. Not used for general H2H strength, venue context, referee, score phases, or recency weighting.

evidence: data/cache/odds_bets_reference.json has 337 bet definitions; cache DB has 1 entry
notes: Reference cache only; not joined into scoring except hard-coded bet ids already in code.

evidence: data/cache/odds_bookmakers_reference.json has 33 bookmakers; cache DB has 1 entry
notes: Reference cache only; bookmaker quality/source selection is not modeled.
